name: Formula X: Grand Prix Car Racing Legends

reviews.review_title: ⭐ This Is the Race I’ve Been Waiting For
reviews.review_description:
This feels like the moment I’ve been training for pure F1-style racing in VR.
Every lap demands focus, every corner tests control, and the speed never lets up.
The garage pulls me in, the controls feel razor-sharp, and the Formula cars feel alive.
Racing the AI keeps the pressure high from lights-out to the final lap.
This isn’t just racing, this is chasing the podiu

It's a good game it just need more tracks some graphical upgrades it definitely need more tracks more cars from the cars to make the game stay alive in the AI cars need to be upgraded cuz they're not aggressive they don't fight for position I even tried pushing one or running into it to see what it gets mad and try to run back into me and didn't do it it just got back into position where he's programmed to do and kept going I'm talking about the cars and not moving fast My car is moving so fast that are even are over I end up over laughing them and when I end up over laughing the cars you can see that the car spawns in out of nowhere and just dropping in front of you and start driving so they really don't pull up a fight almost feel like they ain't AI they NPCs to NPCs don't fight back  AI cars do I play a lot of games that had AI in it in the racing game and they definitely fight back yours don't Hope y'all improve it and make it feel like I'm actually racing against somebody The ones I passed them up they feel like I'm just on a test driving track I practice track driving by myself Even when you get far into track and you try to look around and see where the cars are at you don't see them on the track they just ain't there until you overlap them and then probably pop in front of you I even look back and see where the car behind me I didn't even see a car behind me it's like they glitch out the game once you pass them up and get far you don't see them until you get up on them and that's bad for a game and the breaking needs to be improving improved when I break it don't make no type of break noise unless I'm skidding I'm trying to do a slide and that's the only time I hear it me personally breaks it doesn't respond or no type of sound effects whatsoever and you need more cars and you need definitely need more tracks bigger and longer tracks will more stuff in the environment pit cruise crowds the tracks are dead and they feel boring ain't no life in them it just a empty track you running around and it's too short you don't have enough tracks on there to keep it and keep it engaging that's going to make the game boring when you got small medium tracks that's not really engaging Don't give you that wow look at the environment look at all the trees and the buildings and the tractors or whatever you got going on it's dead no people no crowd no nothing and the way you got to raise to get money to open up another track or get the cars as tedious it's not enough vary on the game to charge like that and buying everything to open it up will make the game boring after you buy everything it's like it's won't even worth it when you fighting to get the money just to open it up that makes it more competitive this game just need an overhaul hopefully y'all do it make this game my best game if you ever play formula x they have a pic crew where you can change your tires out to better tires depending on the pavement and they got a lot of good tracks and the environment is real good and them cars on there actually Ai so they actually compete against you and try to fight for dominance if you ever played formula x you ought to give it a try if  you haven't you might learn something from them keep up the good work just have a lot potential I see the passion y'all have in this game try to make it the best game ever played keep up the good work I'm looking forward to the next update Emma steering needs a little bit optimized

Really confusing to have a second Formula 1 game with X in the title, however this one is much, much worse. 
Dreadful handling. Over sensitive steering, no joystick support only virtual steering which will never be accurate or comfortable. Car engine note is pretty good that's all I can say. No brake feeling or brakes at all really, no brake sfx, no pit voices, lacks every form of polish required to be good. Really basic menu's, little to no options. Poor presentation. An allround horrible game I'm sad to say.

developer_response.body:
Hi YANDMAN — thanks for the honest review.
We understand your concerns, and we want to clarify that the game is actively in development and has already improved significantly since your review. We’ve added new features, refined gameplay systems, and continue to polish handling, controls, audio feedback, and overall presentation with every update.

This is a living project, not a finished drop-and-forget title. Your feedback has been taken seriously, and many of the gaps you mentioned are already being addressed in current and upcoming builds.

If you’re willing to try the latest version and feel the improvements, we’d truly appreciate you revisiting and updating your review to reflect the current state of the game. It directly supports ongoing development and helps us keep improving.

Thanks for giving us a chance to grow.
— Gamotronix Studio 🏁

reviews.review_description: Love the game and I think it has loads of potential. I am the best driver in a game called Formula x and I would love to work with you to help improve the cars if that’s something that interests you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Msnao! 🏁
We really appreciate the kind words and your enthusiasm for the game. It’s great to hear you see the potential, and we’re always open to feedback from passionate players.

We’re continuously improving car behavior and overall driving feel, so insights from experienced players are definitely valuable. Please keep sharing your thoughts through updates and reviews — it truly helps us shape the game.

Thanks for the support and see you on the track! 🚀
— Gamotronix Studio

reviews.review_description:
Thanks for the quick update, make me ready to hit the track. 
You feel the pressure when waiting at the grid, ready for the start signal. Now it’s just keep on practice and beat your PB. 
Looking forward to more updates, making this game even more realistic.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Bmj73! 🏁
We’re really glad the update improved your experience and that you’re enjoying the grid tension and racing flow. Hearing that the game now feels track-ready means a lot to us.

We’re actively working on more updates to push realism even further. Thanks for the support and for being part of the journey — see you on the track! 🚀
— Gamotronix Studio

reviews.review_description: Needs more tracks, livery’s, Ai racers and make them have difficulty levels to make it harder. Over all it’s fun just as of rn it’s a 4 star. Can be better but it’s not an official formula 1 game.
